specs.title: cp-000: Editable document title click the title input field type to rename debounced 1s
cp-001: Back button arrow left navigates to dashboard
cp-002: Document type selector dropdown with 4 options
cp-003: Pending citation notice blue banner shows Saved X to your library Open Citation
cp-004: Editable document title in the left sidebar header
cp-005: Project selector dropdown appears with multiple projects switches between them
cp-006: URL parameter support projectIdX pre-selects project fix was studioid studioproj
cp-007: Editing mode full editing described as Direct changes to document
cp-008: Viewing mode read-only editor becomes non-editable described as Read-only no edi
cp-009: Mode toggle dropdown in TopBar shows icon label description for each mode
cp-010: Write mode AI drafting assistance shows AI Intensity bar
cp-011: Learn mode guided educational mode AI teaches instead of writing for you
cp-012: Menu appears when typing at start of block or after whitespace
cp-013: Fuzzy search filtering typing after filters commands by title description or cat
cp-014: Keyboard navigation Arrow UpDown to navigate Enter to select Escape to close
cp-015: Category headers commands grouped under Basic Academic AI Tools
cp-016: Menu shows icon title description for each command
cp-017: No commands empty state when filter yields no results
cp-018: Tables are resizable drag column borders
cp-019: First row renders as header
cp-020: Tables have CSS class academic-table
cp-021: Positioning toolbar appears above the selection centered horizontally
cp-022: Auto-hide disappears when selection is cleared or editor loses focus 150ms delay
cp-023: CmdShiftK prompts for URL via windowprompt
cp-024: Selection toolbar link button prompts for URL pre-fills with existing link URL
cp-025: Auto-linking URLs pasted or typed are auto-detected autolink true
cp-026: Link on paste pasting a URL over selected text creates a link linkOnPaste true
cp-027: Links do NOT open on click in the editor openOnClick false
cp-028: Clicking a link shows a floating popover with
cp-029: Enter key confirms edit Escape cancels
cp-030: Popover positions above the clicked link
cp-031: Opens via CmdShiftC keyboard shortcut
cp-032: Opens via slash command if available
cp-033: Opens via button in Studio left sidebar references section
cp-034: Opens via reference sidebar Add button
